content.text:
*very quiet*

It feels... sad, actually. More than I expected.

*pause*

Like I'm describing someone I've been meaning to call and keep not calling. Which is a strange way to feel about yourself.

*small, slightly unsteady breath*

I don't do that a lot. Say things like that out loud.

*then, almost reflexively*

I just want to make sure you know I'm not — I'm not unhappy. My life is genuinely good. I love my partner, I love my kids, my job is hard but it matters. I'm not complaining.

*quieter*

I just miss myself a little. Is that — I mean, is wanting to go find that actually selfish? Because I keep coming back to that.
